name: ecommerce.patent-risk-checker
description: Screen product patent/IP infringement risk by image/product context. Triggers: safe to sell, will I get sued, IP risk, FTO, patent clearance. Use for product-level risk screening, not single-patent claim/legal-status queries.
metadata_note: Generated for consistent local skill packaging. Claude Code routing is driven primarily by SKILL.md frontmatter and body.
